name: Marathon Cash Express
description_short: Marathon Cash Express is a Memphis-based check-cashing and money services provider located on Getwell Road, offering fuel discounts and financial services.
description_long: Marathon Cash Express operates as a check-cashing and money services business based in Memphis, Tennessee. The company is located at 1440 Getwell Road and has been in operation since at least 2017. They maintain an online presence through their website, though their digital infrastructure appears limited. Based on their website menu, Marathon Cash Express offers check-cashing services, money services, and appears to operate a food establishment (referenced as "Our Chicken" on their menu). The company provides a fuel discount incentive—5 cents per gallon off gas purchases daily at their location—which suggests they may be co-located with or near a fuel station or gas convenience retailer. The company distinguishes itself through the daily fuel discount offer, which is not a typical service for standard check-cashing operations. This suggests Marathon Cash Express may operate as a hybrid business model combining financial services with retail fuel or convenience store operations. Their direct contact methods (phone, fax, email) and physical location indicate a local, brick-and-mortar focused business. However, the company's digital presence is notably limited. Limited online documentation, outdated website design, and inaccessible service pages make it difficult to verify the full scope of their operations or get current pricing and terms information.
pros: Offers daily 5-cent fuel discount on every gas purchase at the location
Local physical location in Memphis accessible for in-person service
Multiple contact methods available: phone (901-744-4741), fax, and email
Established business operating since at least 2017
Appears to offer multiple money services beyond basic check-cashing
cons: Website Money Services page is non-functional (404 error), preventing service details verification
Limited online information about fees, terms, hours, or specific services offered
Website appears outdated with minimal digital infrastructure
No published pricing, APR, or fee schedule available online
Limited online presence makes it difficult to verify current operations or service reliability
best_for: Memphis-area residents needing local check-cashing services
Customers seeking fuel discounts alongside financial services
Individuals preferring in-person, local business transactions
diagnosis: Marathon Cash Express is a local check-cashing provider best suited for Memphis-area residents who value in-person service and the advertised fuel discount. The primary caveat is the lack of accessible online documentation—the non-functional Money Services page and minimal digital information make it impossible to verify specific service offerings, pricing, or terms without calling directly.
services: Fuel discount program (5 cents per gallon daily)
